function: () => { const fi = document.getElementById('modalRefUpload'); const parent = fi.parentElement; const grand = parent.parentElement; return { fiTagName: fi.tagName, fiOuterHTML: fi.outerHTML.substring(0, 200), parentClass: parent.className, parentHTML: parent.innerHTML.substring(0, 300), parentRect: { x: parent.getBoundingClientRect().x, y: parent.getBoundingClientRect().y, w: parent.getBoundingClientRect().width, h: parent.getBoundingClientRect().height }, grandClass: grand.className, grandRect: { x: grand.getBoundingClientRect().x, y: grand.getBoundingClientRect().y, w: grand.getBoundingClientRect().width, h: grand.getBoundingClientRect().height } }; }
